targets.rawSql: SELECT reltuples::bigint as value FROM pg_class WHERE relname = 'extrinsics'

SELECT MAX(block_number) as value FROM extrinsics WHERE ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ',')))

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT netuid) as value FROM extrinsics WHERE netuid IS NOT NULL AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT address) as value FROM extrinsics WHERE address != '' AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000

SELECT COALESCE(1.0 - (SUM(CASE WHEN success THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)), 0) as value FROM extrinsics WHERE ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000

SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM extrinsics WHERE ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000

SELECT date_trunc('hour', to_timestamp(block_timestamp / 1000.0)) AS time, call_module AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM extrinsics WHERE ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT call_module as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM extrinsics WHERE ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY call_module ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT CASE WHEN success THEN 'Success' ELSE 'Failed' END as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM extrinsics WHERE ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY success

SELECT address, COUNT(*) as count FROM extrinsics WHERE address != '' AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY address ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT netuid, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success) as "success", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT success) as "failures" FROM extrinsics WHERE call_function = 'set_weights' AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY netuid ORDER BY netuid

SELECT 'Subnet ' || netuid::text as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM extrinsics WHERE call_function = 'set_weights' AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY netuid ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

WITH counts AS (SELECT date_trunc('hour', to_timestamp(block_timestamp / 1000.0)) AS time, netuid, COUNT(*) AS value FROM extrinsics WHERE call_function = 'set_weights' AND ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY 1, 2), buckets AS (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('hour', to_timestamp($__from / 1000.0)), date_trunc('hour', to_timestamp($__to / 1000.0)), INTERVAL '1 hour') AS time), subnets AS (SELECT DISTINCT netuid FROM counts) SELECT b.time, lpad(s.netuid::text, 3, '0') AS metric, COALESCE(c.value, 0) AS value FROM buckets b CROSS JOIN subnets s LEFT JOIN counts c ON c.time = b.time AND c.netuid = s.netuid ORDER BY b.time, s.netuid

SELECT call_module, call_function, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN success THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as success_rate FROM extrinsics WHERE ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) AND block_number BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__from) / 12000 AND (SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics) - ((extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000)::bigint - $__to) / 12000 GROUP BY call_module, call_function ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT to_timestamp(block_timestamp / 1000.0) as time, call_module, call_function, netuid, address, success, block_number FROM extrinsics WHERE ('${netuid:csv}' = '*' OR netuid::text = ANY (string_to_array('${netuid:csv}', ','))) AND ('${status:csv}' = '*' OR success::text = ANY (string_to_array('${status:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_module:csv}' = '*' OR call_module = ANY (string_to_array('${call_module:csv}', ','))) AND ('${call_function:csv}' = '*' OR call_function = ANY (string_to_array('${call_function:csv}', ','))) AND ('${address:csv}' = '*' OR address = ANY (string_to_array('${address:csv}', ','))) ORDER BY block_timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

list.definition: SELECT netuid AS __value, netuid || ' - ' || COALESCE(name, 'Unknown') AS __text FROM metagraph_subnet WHERE netuid != 0 ORDER BY netuid
list.label: Subnet
list.name: netuid
list.query: SELECT netuid AS __value, netuid || ' - ' || COALESCE(name, 'Unknown') AS __text FROM metagraph_subnet WHERE netuid != 0 ORDER BY netuid

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT call_module FROM extrinsics WHERE block_number > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics), 0) - 50000 ORDER BY call_module
list.label: Module
list.name: call_module
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT call_module FROM extrinsics WHERE block_number > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics), 0) - 50000 ORDER BY call_module

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT call_function FROM extrinsics WHERE block_number > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics), 0) - 50000 ORDER BY call_function
list.label: Function
list.name: call_function
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT call_function FROM extrinsics WHERE block_number > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics), 0) - 50000 ORDER BY call_function

list.definition: SELECT address FROM extrinsics WHERE address != '' AND block_number > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics), 0) - 50000 GROUP BY address ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 100
list.label: Address (top 100)
list.name: address
list.query: SELECT address FROM extrinsics WHERE address != '' AND block_number > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(block_number) FROM extrinsics), 0) - 50000 GROUP BY address ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 100
